title: Mounting box CA150 for RouterBOARD RB450
description: CA150 is a mounting box from MikroTik for indoor use and is intended only for MikroTik RouterBOARD models RB450, RB450G and RB850Gx2. There are molded holes for 5 Ethernet ports on the side and a hole for the power jack and RS232 serial port on the front
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Shielding Yes Mounting On the wall, On desktop Purpose Indoor Material Aluminum Width [mm] 113 Height [mm] 30 Depth [mm] 213 Color Black
